title: New #1 open-source AI model is here!
summary: A YouTube review of GLM 5.2, an open-source AI model claimed as the new best in its class. The video demonstrates capabilities including digital earth visualization, animation with voiceover, 3D model generation, ray tracing, music composition, and mathematical animation, with integration into Claude Code also covered.
writeup: AI Search reviews GLM 5.2, an open-source model billed as the new best in its class, and runs it through a range of demonstrations. The tasks include digital earth visualization, animation with voiceover, 3D model generation, ray tracing, music composition, and mathematical animation, with integration into Claude Code also covered. The breadth signals a single open-source model spanning multimodal generation, 3D reconstruction, and audio rather than a single specialized task. The Claude Code integration shows it operating inside an existing coding workflow.
